item.name: Yak T'el Crab
item.description:
A blue-shelled crab that inhabits the deep, dark waters of Xty'iinbek Tsoly.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: Xbr'aal folklore describes this crab as a messenger of the underworld. The Mamool Ja, on the other hand, consider it a herald of the heavens above.
